name: MeshTextureCoordinateList
summary: Provides access to the Vertex Texture coordinates of a Mesh.

methods.name: Add(Point2f)
methods.summary: Adds a new texture coordinate to the end of the Texture list.

params.name: tc
params.doc: Texture coordinate to add.

returns.doc: The index of the newly added texture coordinate.

methods.name: Add(Point3d)
methods.summary: Adds a new texture coordinate to the end of the Texture list.

params.name: tc
params.doc: Texture coordinate to add.

returns.doc: The index of the newly added texture coordinate.

methods.name: Add(Double, Double)
methods.signature: public int Add(double s, double t)
methods.summary: Adds a new texture coordinate to the end of the Texture list.

params.name: s
params.doc: S component of new texture coordinate.

params.name: t
params.doc: T component of new texture coordinate.

returns.doc: The index of the newly added texture coordinate.

methods.name: Add(Single, Single)
methods.signature: public int Add(float s, float t)
methods.summary: Adds a new texture coordinate to the end of the Texture list.

params.name: s
params.doc: S component of new texture coordinate.

params.name: t
params.doc: T component of new texture coordinate.

returns.doc: The index of the newly added texture coordinate.

methods.name: AddRange
methods.summary: Appends an array of texture coordinates.

params.name: textureCoordinates
params.doc: Texture coordinates to append.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: Clear
methods.summary: Clears the Texture Coordinate list on the mesh.

methods.name: Destroy
methods.summary: Releases all memory allocated to store texture coordinates. The list capacity will be 0 after this call. Subsequent calls can add new items.

methods.name: GetEnumerator
methods.summary: Gets an enumerator that yields all texture coordinates in this collection.

methods.name: NormalizeTextureCoordinates
methods.summary: Scales the texture coordinates so the texture domains are [0,1] and eliminate any texture rotations.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: ReverseTextureCoordinates
methods.summary: Reverses one coordinate direction of the texture coordinates. The region of the bitmap the texture uses does not change. Either Us or Vs direction is flipped.

params.name: direction
params.doc: 0 = first texture coordinate is reversed.1 = second texture coordinate is reversed.

returns.doc: true if operation succeeded; otherwise, false.

methods.name: SetTextureCoordinate(Int32, Point2f)
methods.signature: public bool SetTextureCoordinate(int index, Point2f tc)
methods.summary: Sets or adds a texture coordinate to the Texture Coordinate List. If [index] is less than [Count], the existing coordinate at [index] will be modified.If [index] equals [Count], a new coordinate is appended to the end of the coordinate list.If [index] is larger than [Count], the function will return false.

params.name: index
params.doc: Index of texture coordinate to set.

params.name: tc
params.doc: Texture coordinate point.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: SetTextureCoordinate(Int32, Point3f)
methods.signature: public bool SetTextureCoordinate(int index, Point3f tc)
methods.summary: Sets or adds a texture coordinate to the Texture Coordinate List. If [index] is less than [Count], the existing coordinate at [index] will be modified.If [index] equals [Count], a new coordinate is appended to the end of the coordinate list.If [index] is larger than [Count], the function will return false.

params.name: index
params.doc: Index of texture coordinate to set.

params.name: tc
params.doc: Texture coordinate point.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: SetTextureCoordinate(Int32, Double, Double)
methods.signature: public bool SetTextureCoordinate(int index, double s, double t)
methods.summary: Sets or adds a texture coordinate to the Texture Coordinate List. If [index] is less than [Count], the existing coordinate at [index] will be modified.If [index] equals [Count], a new coordinate is appended to the end of the coordinate list.If [index] is larger than [Count], the function will return false.

params.name: index
params.doc: Index of texture coordinate to set.

params.name: s
params.doc: S component of texture coordinate.

params.name: t
params.doc: T component of texture coordinate.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: SetTextureCoordinate(Int32, Single, Single)
methods.signature: public bool SetTextureCoordinate(int index, float s, float t)
methods.summary: Sets or adds a texture coordinate to the Texture Coordinate List. If [index] is less than [Count], the existing coordinate at [index] will be modified.If [index] equals [Count], a new coordinate is appended to the end of the coordinate list.If [index] is larger than [Count], the function will return false.

params.name: index
params.doc: Index of texture coordinate to set.

params.name: s
params.doc: S component of texture coordinate.

params.name: t
params.doc: T component of texture coordinate.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: SetTextureCoordinates(Point2f[])
methods.summary: Sets all texture coordinates in one go.

params.name: textureCoordinates
params.doc: Texture coordinates to assign to the mesh.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: SetTextureCoordinates(TextureMapping)
methods.summary: Set all texture coordinates based on a texture mapping function

params.name: mapping
params.doc: The new mapping type.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: ToFloatArray
methods.summary: Copies all vertices to a linear array of float in u,v order

methods.name: TransposeTextureCoordinates
methods.summary: Transposes texture coordinates. The region of the bitmap the texture uses does not change. All texture coordinates rows (Us) become columns (Vs), and vice versa.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

properties.name: Capacity
properties.summary: Gets or sets the total number of texture coordinates the internal data structure can hold without resizing.

properties.name: Count
properties.summary: Gets or sets the number of texture coordinates.

properties.name: Item
properties.summary: Gets or sets the texture coordinate at the given index. The index must be valid or an IndexOutOfRangeException will be thrown.
